title: Adding Priority Stars to the Kanban View_closed cards
excerpt: We primarily work in Kanban view and would like to be able to prioritize our work easily, utilizing the 3-star system in the priority column. It would best serve us to view the stars on the Kanban view.

posts.author: tlloydroberts (Temple Lloyd-Roberts)
posts.cookedHtml: We primarily work in Kanban view and would like to be able to prioritize our work easily, utilizing the 3-star system in the priority column. It would best serve us to view the stars on the Kanban view.
